mapper.select: select rsvn_seq from room_rsvn where room_seq = #{room_seq}
select m.room_name, r.* from room_rsvn r left outer join meeting_rooms m on r.room_seq = m.room_seq where r.users_id = #{users_id} order by start_dt desc
mapper.insert:
select rsvn_seq.nextval from dual
insert into room_rsvn values (#{rsvn_seq}, #{room_seq}, #{users_id}, #{title}, #{start_dt}, #{end_dt}, sysdate)
mapper.select: select r.*, mr.room_name, m.rm_seq, m.users_id as att_users_id, u.name as att_name, u.sysname as att_sysname from room_rsvn r LEFT JOIN meeting_rooms mr ON r.room_seq = mr.room_seq LEFT JOIN room_rsvn_member m ON r.rsvn_seq = m.rsvn_seq LEFT JOIN users u ON m.users_id = u.id where r.rsvn_seq = #{rsvn_seq}
mapper.update: update room_rsvn set room_seq = #{room_seq}, title = #{title}, start_dt = TO_TIMESTAMP(#{start_dt}, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'), end_dt = TO_TIMESTAMP(#{end_dt}, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') where rsvn_seq = #{rsvn_seq}
mapper.delete: delete from room_rsvn_member where rsvn_seq = #{rsvn_seq} and users_id = #{users_id}
